report.summary: Second design polish pass: fixed critical missing OG images/metadata on Drift Protocol and Polkadot pages, added StructuredData and BackToTop components, fixed mobile table overflow on Stablecoin Payments page.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Drift Protocol hack page: added StructuredData JSON-LD component for SEO rich snippets
Drift Protocol hack page: added BackToTop component for long-form content navigation
Drift Protocol hack page: fixed breadcrumb last item (removed erroneous href='#' causing anchor navigation)
Drift Protocol hack page: added canonical URL and twitter card metadata
Polkadot staking guide: added StructuredData JSON-LD component for SEO rich snippets
Polkadot staking guide: added BackToTop component for scroll navigation
Polkadot staking guide: fixed breadcrumb last item (removed href='#')
Polkadot staking guide: added canonical URL and twitter card metadata
Stablecoin Payments guide: wrapped both tables in overflow-x:auto container for mobile horizontal scrolling (was overflow:hidden which truncated content)
Stablecoin Payments guide: added min-width:500px to tables to prevent column crushing on phones

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-drift-protocol-hack-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with red security alert badge, shield/warning decorations, circuit pattern, degen0x branding
OG image: og-polkadot-staking-halving-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with Polkadot pink (#E6007A) accent badge, staking decorations, degen0x branding

sections.title: Metadata & SEO Fixes
items: Drift Protocol: added openGraph.images array with OG image reference (was completely missing)
Drift Protocol: added twitter card (summary_large_image) with image
Drift Protocol: added alternates.canonical URL
Drift Protocol: added generateArticleSchema structured data (wordCount: 3500)
Polkadot: added openGraph.images array with OG image reference (was completely missing)
Polkadot: added twitter card (summary_large_image) with image
Polkadot: added alternates.canonical URL
Polkadot: added generateArticleSchema structured data (wordCount: 3200)

sections.title: Pages Audited (No Additional Changes Needed)
items: Wrapped Bitcoin Comparison Guide — OG image present, metadata complete (fixed in v1 cycle)
Stablecoin Yield Tracker tool — OG image present, responsive grid verified, touch targets OK
Shared Sequencing Guide — OG image present, metadata complete (fixed in v1 cycle)
